title: Ingest clunger rewrite plan into Graphiti

log.context: Ingest clunger rewrite plan into Graphiti

All 6 episodes queued successfully. Here's what was ingested into Graphiti group `clunger`:

**Episode 1 — Migration plan**
Full context of the serve.py → TypeScript rewrite: rationale, what changes vs. stays Python, phase breakdown (1-6), parallel dev approach (clunger on :8081 alongside serve.py on :8080), rollback strategy, open questions.

**Episode 2 — Proto contracts (all 5 services)**
Complete RPC signatures and message field layouts for CongressService, PersonaService, AgentService, Task...(truncated)
